mapper.select:
select id, name, status, remark, create_time as createTime from category
is_deleted = 0
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
select id, name, status, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from category where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select id, name, status, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from category where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.update: update category set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
